metadata.title: Phosphorus31 Ecosystem: Decentralized Science and Quantum Computing Framework
metadata.description: The Phosphorus31 (P31) ecosystem represents a paradigm shift in decentralized, neuro-inclusive design. This repository contains the core Andromeda codebase, BONDING live interactive game, Phenix Navigator hardware interface, and comprehensive documentation for building a self-sustaining Node network. The ecosystem bridges academic rigor with interactive digital sandboxes, implementing gamified citizen science, quantum biological cryptography, and community-driven development.
metadata.notes: This Zenodo archive contains the complete Phosphorus31 ecosystem as of March 22, 2026. For the latest development, please visit the GitHub repository.
